---
title: "main analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(skimr)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Load Data
```{r}
data <-read.csv("HINTSdata_2020_clean.csv")
```

## Descriptive Statistics 
```{r}
summary(data)
```
##Five Number Summary

```{r}
fivenum(data$Age,AvgDrinksPerWeek,WeeklyMinutesModerateExercise,BMI)
```
##Mean, Variance, and Standard Deviation

```{r}
mean(data$Age,AvgDrinksPerWeek,WeeklyMinutesModerateExercise,BMI,na.rm=TRUE)
var(data$Age,AvgDrinksPerWeek,WeeklyMinutesModerateExercise,BMI,na.rm=TRUE)
sd(data$Age,AvgDrinksPerWeek,WeeklyMinutesModerateExercise,BMI,na.rm=TRUE)
```
## SKim Summary of Numeric Variables

```{r}
library(skimr)
skim(numeric_data)
```

##Conclusion
The descriptive statistics provide an overview of the distribution of the numeric variables in the HINTS data set.
